layers.allowed_claim: A codon stream is read under a named genetic-code table.
layers.forbidden_claim: Codon assignment alone establishes protein realization.

layers.allowed_claim: A sequence window is eligible as an ORF candidate under stated context.
A chain has translation or protein-level evidence under stated context.
layers.forbidden_claim: A translated chain establishes folded structure.

layers.allowed_claim: A chain or region has order, disorder, or ensemble evidence.
layers.forbidden_claim: Structural order establishes physical admissibility or function.

layers.allowed_claim: A structural state is not excluded by stated physical evidence.
A state has functional evidence in a stated assay context.

layer_descriptions.code_read: codon-to-label readback at the standard genetic code
layer_descriptions.orf_eligibility: open-reading-frame eligibility from start/stop codon enumeration
layer_descriptions.structural_order: folded protein tertiary structure under physiological conditions
layer_descriptions.physical_admissibility: thermodynamic and kinetic admissibility of the folded form
layer_descriptions.function_realization: in-vivo or in-vitro functional assay outcome of the protein
